package-managers.name: Corepack
package-managers.description: Node.js-bundled shim that pins and provisions the exact pnpm or Yarn version a project declares.

package-managers.name: Volta
package-managers.description: Rust-based toolchain manager that pins Node, npm, and package-manager versions per project.

package-managers.name: ni
package-managers.description: Antfu's wrapper that runs the right npm/pnpm/yarn/bun command based on the detected lockfile.

package-managers.name: Nx
package-managers.description: Extensible monorepo build system with task caching, project graphs, generators, and workspace management.

package-managers.name: Turborepo
package-managers.description: Rust-based high-performance monorepo task runner with remote caching from Vercel.

package-managers.name: Lerna
package-managers.description: Veteran monorepo tool for versioning and publishing multiple packages, now powered by Nx under the hood.

package-managers.name: Changesets
package-managers.description: Workflow tool for managing versioning and changelogs across multi-package monorepos.

bundlers.name: tsup
bundlers.description: Zero-config esbuild-powered bundler for TypeScript libraries, emitting ESM, CJS, and type declarations.

bundlers.name: tsdown
bundlers.description: Rolldown-powered library bundler positioned as a faster successor to tsup with the same DX.

bundlers.name: unbuild
bundlers.description: Unified build system from the UnJS ecosystem with multiple presets and a stub mode for dev.

bundlers.name: Bun.build
bundlers.description: Bun's native, extremely fast bundler for JavaScript, TypeScript, and JSX.

bundlers.name: Metro
bundlers.description: The JavaScript bundler purpose-built for React Native applications.

bundlers.name: Microbundle
bundlers.description: Zero-config Rollup-based bundler for tiny modules, optimized for minimal output.

bundlers.name: Farm
bundlers.description: Rust-based web build tool offering Vite-compatible plugins with very fast HMR and builds.

bundlers.name: Mako
bundlers.description: Rust-based bundler from Ant Group's Umi team focused on production build speed.

bundlers.name: TypeScript Compiler (tsc)
bundlers.description: The official TypeScript compiler, used directly to emit JavaScript and declaration files.

test-runners.name: AVA
test-runners.description: Minimal test runner that runs tests concurrently in isolated processes for speed.

test-runners.name: uvu
test-runners.description: Extremely fast and lightweight test runner for Node.js and the browser.

test-runners.name: Jasmine
test-runners.description: Behavior-driven JavaScript testing framework with no external dependencies.

test-runners.name: WebdriverIO
test-runners.description: All-in-one browser and mobile automation framework for component and end-to-end tests.

test-runners.name: TestCafe
test-runners.description: Node.js end-to-end testing tool that runs in real browsers without WebDriver.

test-runners.name: Web Test Runner
test-runners.description: Modern Web's test runner that executes tests in real browsers via Playwright or WebDriver.

test-runners.name: Wallaby.js
test-runners.description: Commercial continuous test runner that shows results and coverage inline in your editor.

linters-formatters.name: Oxlint
linters-formatters.description: Oxc's Rust-based linter, tens of times faster than ESLint with hundreds of built-in rules.

linters-formatters.name: Knip
linters-formatters.description: Finds unused files, dependencies, and exports in JavaScript and TypeScript projects.

linters-formatters.name: publint
linters-formatters.description: Linter that checks npm packages for the widest compatibility across bundlers and runtimes.

linters-formatters.name: StandardJS
linters-formatters.description: Zero-config, opinionated JavaScript style guide, linter, and formatter in one.

linters-formatters.name: Ruff
linters-formatters.description: Rust-based Python linter and formatter that replaces Flake8, isort, and Black at high speed.

linters-formatters.name: ESLint Stylistic
linters-formatters.description: Community-maintained set of stylistic ESLint rules that took over deprecated formatting rules.

linters-formatters.name: Trunk Check
linters-formatters.description: Meta-linter that orchestrates many linters and formatters behind a single fast CLI.

validation-libraries.name: Ajv
validation-libraries.description: Fastest JSON Schema validator for Node.js and the browser, widely used in tooling.

validation-libraries.name: class-validator
validation-libraries.description: Decorator-based validation for classes, the default validator in NestJS apps.

validation-libraries.name: io-ts
validation-libraries.description: Runtime type system for IO decoding built on the fp-ts functional programming ecosystem.

validation-libraries.name: Runtypes
validation-libraries.description: Runtime validation library for TypeScript with static type inference and ergonomic combinators.

validation-libraries.name: VineJS
validation-libraries.description: Very fast form-data validation library for Node.js, bundled with AdonisJS.

validation-libraries.name: ow
validation-libraries.description: Expressive function argument validation library with a fluent assertion API.

validation-libraries.name: Zod Mini
validation-libraries.description: Tree-shakable functional variant of Zod v4 aimed at minimal bundle size.
